nasb.text: “Now this is the case of the manslayer who may flee there and live: when he kills his friend unintentionally, not hating him previously—

esv.text: “This is the provision for the manslayer, who by fleeing there may save his life. If anyone kills his neighbor unintentionally without having hated him in the past—

cnv.text: “誤殺人的逃到那裡，就可以存活，規例是這樣：無意殺了人，彼此又素無仇恨的，

ccb.text: “如果有人无意间杀了素无冤仇的同伴，他可以逃往避难城，以保住性命。
